scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/worker" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/worker && npm run typecheck -w apps/web
